author: SypherPK
text:
Last to Hold the Rarest Sprite, Keeps it!
100 Fortnite Players HUNT for the RARE Grim Reaper Sprite! The player who holds it at the end of 30 minutes will get to keep it! 
I also invited @Aid and @Premfn to compete in this video. Enjoy guys!
